phase: Phase 5 - Deterministic State Machine And Eligibility Validation

authority_notes.build_plan_detail: TransitionRule.rule_id tr_001 through tr_051 and default_recovery_states are required implementation fields.
authority_notes.spec_status: omits rule IDs and per-row default recovery state lists
authority_notes.resolution: Phase 5 build-plan details are applied while spec 02 remains the function/route table authority.

authority_notes.build_plan_detail: Blocks If values are normalized into central BlockerCode values with one RecoveryStateClass mapping.
authority_notes.spec_status: uses prose blocker descriptions in the table
authority_notes.resolution: Phase 5 blocker code list and mapping are applied.

authority_notes.build_plan_detail: Resolver evidence sources include Phase 3 Kernel stores plus read-only owner evidence snapshots.
authority_notes.spec_status: registers kernel.active_database_state.v1 but does not define Phase 5 local evidence helper schemas
authority_notes.resolution: Phase 5 local helper schemas state.evidence_bundle.v1 and state.evidence_ref.v1 are applied without promoting them to the Phase 2 registry.
